card_description: Maren is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies his experience as a literal fulfillment of Biblical promise (Psalm 116) and a commissioning into the class of "prophets."
